channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: How a chemical tank disaster struck at the heart of a Washington state mill town
item.description: A chemical tank failure at a paper mill in Washington state this past week has struck at the heart of a historic mill town.

item.title: Louisiana enacts new congressional districts in a bid to give the GOP another seat
In Southern California Chinese enclave, a mayor’s arrest stokes fears of Beijing’s influence
